---
title: "BBB 26 — Provas"
subtitle: "Resultados e classificação geral das provas"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events, setup_bbb_dark_theme, load_participants_index,
    load_prova_rankings, load_provas_raw,
    GROUP_COLORS,
)

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()

# Load derived rankings
rankings = load_prova_rankings()

leaderboard = rankings["leaderboard"]
provas_summary = rankings["provas_summary"]
scoring = rankings["_metadata"]["scoring"]

# Load raw provas (phase-by-phase detail)
provas_raw = load_provas_raw()

provas_list = provas_raw["provas"]

# Load participant index (avatars, groups, status)
participants_index = load_participants_index()

PINFO = {p["name"]: p for p in participants_index["participants"]}

TIPO_EMOJI = {"lider": "👑", "anjo": "😇", "bate_volta": "⚔️"}
TIPO_LABEL = {"lider": "Líder", "anjo": "Anjo", "bate_volta": "Bate e Volta"}
TIPO_COLOR = {"lider": "#f1c40f", "anjo": "#3498db", "bate_volta": "#e74c3c"}

def get_avatar(name):
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("avatar", "")

def get_grupo(name):
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("grupo", "Pipoca")

def is_active(name):
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("active", True)

def get_status(name):
    return PINFO.get(name, {}).get("status", "")
```

```{python}
#| label: destaques
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DESTAQUES - Key highlights
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

highlights = []

leader = leaderboard[0] if leaderboard else None
if leader:
    highlights.append(f"🏆 **{leader['name']}** lidera com **{leader['total_points']} pts** e **{leader['wins']} vitória(s)**")

total_provas = len(provas_list)
highlights.append(f"📋 **{total_provas}** provas registradas (Semanas 1–2)")

# Most wins
max_wins = max((p["wins"] for p in leaderboard), default=0)
if max_wins > 0:
    winners = [p["name"] for p in leaderboard if p["wins"] == max_wins]
    if len(winners) == 1:
        highlights.append(f"🥇 Mais vitórias: **{winners[0]}** ({max_wins})")
    else:
        highlights.append(f"🥇 Mais vitórias ({max_wins}): **{', '.join(winners)}**")

# Best avg (min 2 provas)
eligible = [p for p in leaderboard if p["provas_participated"] >= 2 and p["avg_points"] > 0]
if eligible:
    best_avg = max(eligible, key=lambda p: p["avg_points"])
    highlights.append(f"📊 Melhor média (min 2 provas): **{best_avg['name']}** ({best_avg['avg_points']:.1f} pts/prova)")

if highlights:
    print('''
<div class="info-panel u-s050">
<div class="u-s035">Destaques — Provas</div>
<ul class="u-s073">
''')
    for h in highlights:
        print(f"<li>{h}</li>")
    print("</ul></div>")
```

```{python}
#| label: kpi-boxes
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# KPI Value Boxes
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

unique_winners = len(set(p["vencedor"] for p in provas_list))

# Best average (min 2 provas)
eligible_avg = [p for p in leaderboard if p["provas_participated"] >= 2 and p["avg_points"] > 0]
best_avg_p = max(eligible_avg, key=lambda p: p["avg_points"]) if eligible_avg else None

print(f'''
<div class="stat-row">

<div class="stat-card u-s045">
<div class="stat-value">{total_provas}</div>
<div class="stat-label">📋 Provas</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-card u-s006">
<div class="stat-value">{unique_winners}</div>
<div class="stat-label">🏆 Vencedores únicos</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-card u-s003">
<div class="stat-value">{best_avg_p["avg_points"]:.1f}</div>
<div class="stat-label">📊 Melhor média ({best_avg_p["name"].split()[0]})</div>
</div>

</div>
''')
```

# Classificação Geral {#ranking}

Ranking baseado em pontos ponderados: posição na prova gera pontos-base, multiplicados pelo tipo (Líder 1.5x, Anjo 1.0x, Bate e Volta 0.75x).

```{python}
#| label: leaderboard-cards
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Leaderboard Cards (matching cartola.qmd style)
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

if leaderboard:
    print('<div class="info-grid u-s071">')

    for i, p in enumerate(leaderboard):
        rank = i + 1
        name = p["name"]
        avatar_url = get_avatar(name)
        grupo = get_grupo(name)
        active = is_active(name)
        status = get_status(name)

        total = p["total_points"]
        avg = p["avg_points"]
        wins = p["wins"]
        top3 = p["top3"]
        participated = p["provas_participated"]
        available = p["provas_available"]
        rate = p["participation_rate"]

        # Border color logic
        if not active:
            border_color = '#6c757d'
        elif rank == 1:
            border_color = '#f1c40f'
        elif rank == 2:
            border_color = '#aaa'
        elif rank == 3:
            border_color = '#cd7f32'
        elif total > 0:
            border_color = '#3498db'
        else:
            border_color = '#444'

        # Status badge for eliminated/quit
        status_badge = ''
        if not active and status:
            status_badge = f'<span class="fs-xs u-s002">{status}</span>'

        # Group badge
        grupo_color = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, '#666')
        grupo_badge = f'<span class="fs-xs" style="background: {grupo_color}; color: #fff; padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: 0.5rem;">{grupo}</span>'

        # Tags
        tags = []
        if wins > 0:
            tags.append(f'<span class="fs-sm u-s021">🏆 {wins} vitória{"s" if wins > 1 else ""}</span>')
        if top3 > 0:
            tags.append(f'<span class="fs-sm u-s021">🥉 {top3} top-3</span>')
        tags.append(f'<span class="fs-sm u-s021">📊 avg {avg:.1f} pts</span>')
        tags.append(f'<span class="fs-sm u-s021">📋 {participated}/{available} provas</span>')
        tags_html = f'<div class="u-s078">{"".join(tags)}</div>'

        # Points display
        pts_color = '#f1c40f' if rank == 1 else ('#27ae60' if total > 0 else '#888')
        rank_display = f"{rank}º"

        print(f'''
<div style="background: #2a2a2a; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid {border_color}; padding: 1rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;">
<div class="u-s062">
''')
        if avatar_url:
            print(f'<img src="{avatar_url}" alt="{name}" style="width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid {border_color}; object-fit: cover;">')
        else:
            print(f'<div class="fs-3xl" style="width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid {border_color}; background: #444; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #888;">?</div>')

        if rank <= 3:
            rank_emoji = '🥇' if rank == 1 else ('🥈' if rank == 2 else '🥉')
            print(f'<div class="fs-xl u-s106">{rank_emoji}</div>')

        print(f'''
</div>
<div class="u-s063">
<div class="u-s050">
<div>
<span class="fs-xl u-s010">{rank_display} {name}</span>
{grupo_badge}
{status_badge}
</div>
<div class="fs-3xl" style="font-weight: bold; color: {pts_color};">{total}</div>
</div>
{tags_html}
</div>
</div>
''')

    print('</div>')
else:
    print('<p class="text-muted">Nenhum participante encontrado.</p>')
```

# Resultados por Prova {#provas}

Detalhamento por prova: classificação fase a fase, duplas, desclassificações e pontuações.

```{python}
#| label: per-prova-tabs
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Per-Prova Results in Tabset
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

if provas_list:
    print('::: {.panel-tabset}\n')

    for prova in provas_list:
        num = prova["numero"]
        tipo = prova["tipo"]
        emoji = TIPO_EMOJI.get(tipo, "🏅")
        label = TIPO_LABEL.get(tipo, tipo.title())
        color = TIPO_COLOR.get(tipo, "#888")
        date = prova["date"]
        nome = prova["nome"]
        vencedor = prova["vencedor"]
        vencedor_avatar = get_avatar(vencedor)
        n_participantes = prova["participantes_total"]
        week = prova["week"]
        formato = prova.get("formato", "")
        excluidos = prova.get("excluidos", [])
        fases = prova.get("fases", [])

        print(f'## {emoji} #{num} {label} (Sem {week})\n')

        # Header card
        print(f'''
<div style="background: #2a2a2a; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 5px solid {color}; padding: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">
''')
        if vencedor_avatar:
            print(f'<img src="{vencedor_avatar}" alt="{vencedor}" style="width: 55px; height: 55px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid {color}; object-fit: cover;">')
        print(f'''
<div class="u-s381">
<div class="fs-xl u-s010">{nome}</div>
<div class="fs-base u-s219">📅 {date} &middot; {emoji} {label} &middot; Semana {week} &middot; {n_participantes} participantes</div>
<div class="u-s411">
<span class="fs-base" style="background: {color}; color: #fff; padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 5px; font-weight: bold;">🏆 Vencedor: {vencedor}</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
''')

        # Excluded list
        if excluidos:
            nomes_exc = ", ".join([f"**{e['nome']}** ({e['motivo']})" for e in excluidos])
            print(f'\n<div class="table-md u-s115">🚫 Não participaram: {nomes_exc}</div>\n')

        # Phase breakdown
        for fase in fases:
            fase_num = fase["fase"]
            fase_tipo = fase.get("tipo", "individual")
            classificacao = fase.get("classificacao", [])
            nota = fase.get("nota", "")
            is_duo = fase_tipo == "dupla"

            fase_label = "Dupla" if is_duo else "Individual"
            print(f'\n**Fase {fase_num} — {fase_label}**')
            if nota:
                print(f' <span class="text-muted table-md">({nota})</span>')
            print()

            if classificacao:
                print('<div class="u-s430">')
                print('<table class="table-full fs-base">')
                print('<thead><tr class="u-s028">')
                print('<th class="tc cell-compact text-muted u-s483">Pos</th>')
                if is_duo:
                    print('<th class="tl cell-compact text-muted">Dupla</th>')
                else:
                    print('<th class="tl cell-compact text-muted">Participante</th>')
                if any(e.get("pontuacao") is not None for e in classificacao):
                    print('<th class="tr cell-compact text-muted">Pontuação</th>')
                print('</tr></thead><tbody>')

                has_scores = any(e.get("pontuacao") is not None for e in classificacao)

                for entry in classificacao:
                    pos = entry.get("pos", "?")
                    is_dq = entry.get("dq", False)
                    is_tied = entry.get("tied", False)

                    # Position styling
                    if is_dq:
                        pos_display = '<span class="u-s223">DQ</span>'
                        row_class = 'u-s227'
                    elif pos == 1:
                        pos_display = f'<span class="u-s024">🥇 {pos}º</span>'
                        row_class = 'u-s229'
                    elif pos == 2:
                        pos_display = f'<span class="u-s220">🥈 {pos}º</span>'
                        row_class = 'u-s022'
                    elif pos == 3:
                        pos_display = f'<span class="u-s222">🥉 {pos}º</span>'
                        row_class = 'u-s221'
                    else:
                        pos_display = f'{pos}º'
                        row_class = 'u-s021'

                    tied_icon = ' <span class="text-muted table-sm">= empate</span>' if is_tied else ''

                    # Name(s)
                    if is_duo:
                        dupla = entry.get("dupla", [])
                        name_display = " + ".join(dupla)
                    else:
                        name_display = entry.get("nome", "?")

                    pontuacao_cell = ""
                    if has_scores:
                        score = entry.get("pontuacao")
                        pontuacao_cell = f'<td class="tr cell-compact u-s213">{score if score is not None else "—"}</td>'

                    print(f'<tr class="sep-bottom {row_class}">')
                    print(f'<td class="tc cell-compact">{pos_display}{tied_icon}</td>')
                    print(f'<td class="tl cell-compact" style="font-weight: {"bold" if pos <= 3 and not is_dq else "normal"};">{name_display}</td>')
                    if pontuacao_cell:
                        print(pontuacao_cell)
                    print('</tr>')

                print('</tbody></table>')
                print('</div>')

        # Bracket visualization for duel-format competitions
        for fase in fases:
            quartas = fase.get("classificacao_quartas")
            semis = fase.get("classificacao_semis")
            final = fase.get("classificacao_final")
            if quartas and semis and final:
                print(f'\n**Chave de Duelos — Fase {fase["fase"]}**\n')

                def bracket_cell(name, is_winner=False, is_dq=False, nota=""):
                    style = "padding: 4px 8px; white-space: nowrap;"
                    css_class = "fs-base"
                    if is_dq:
                        style += " color: #e74c3c; text-decoration: line-through;"
                        suffix = ' <span class="fs-xs u-s005">(DQ)</span>'
                    elif is_winner:
                        style += " color: #f1c40f; font-weight: bold;"
                        suffix = ""
                    else:
                        style += " color: #aaa;"
                        suffix = ""
                    return f'<div class="{css_class}" style="{style}">{name}{suffix}</div>'

                def matchup_box(duelo, round_label=""):
                    j = duelo["jogadores"]
                    v = duelo["vencedor"]
                    nota = duelo.get("nota", "")
                    dq_names = set()
                    if "desclassificad" in nota.lower():
                        for n in j:
                            if n != v:
                                dq_names.add(n)
                    cells = ""
                    for name in j:
                        cells += bracket_cell(name, is_winner=(name == v), is_dq=(name in dq_names))
                    box = f'<div class="u-s202">'
                    box += cells
                    box += f'</div>'
                    return box

                # Build the bracket as a 3-column flex layout
                print('<div class="u-s308">')

                # Column 1: Quartas
                print('<div class="u-s048">')
                print('<div class="tc text-muted fs-sm u-s067">Quartas</div>')
                for d in quartas:
                    print(matchup_box(d))
                print('</div>')

                # Column 2: Semis
                print('<div class="u-s048">')
                print('<div class="tc text-muted fs-sm u-s067">Semis</div>')
                for d in semis:
                    print(matchup_box(d))
                print('</div>')

                # Column 3: Final
                print('<div class="u-s304">')
                print('<div class="tc text-muted fs-sm u-s067">Final</div>')
                for d in final:
                    print(matchup_box(d))
                    winner = d["vencedor"]
                    print(f'<div class="tc fs-lg u-s414">🏆 <span class="u-s024">{winner}</span></div>')
                print('</div>')

                print('</div>')

        # Points awarded for this prova (from leaderboard detail)
        multiplier = scoring["type_multipliers"].get(tipo, 1.0)
        mult_label = f"{multiplier:.1f}x" if multiplier != 1.0 else "1.0x"

        scored_entries = []
        for p in leaderboard:
            for d in p.get("detail", []):
                if d["prova"] == num and d["position"] is not None and d["weighted_pts"] is not None:
                    scored_entries.append({
                        "name": p["name"],
                        "position": d["position"],
                        "base_pts": d["base_pts"],
                        "weighted_pts": d["weighted_pts"],
                    })
        scored_entries.sort(key=lambda x: (0 if isinstance(x["position"], int) else 1, x["position"] if isinstance(x["position"], int) else 999))

        if scored_entries:
            print(f'\n<details class="u-s072"><summary class="fs-base u-s295">📊 Pontos atribuídos (multiplicador {label}: {mult_label})</summary>')
            print('<div class="u-s431">')
            print('<table class="table-full table-md">')
            print('<thead><tr class="u-s028">')
            print('<th class="tl text-muted u-s026">Participante</th>')
            print('<th class="tc text-muted u-s026">Pos</th>')
            print('<th class="tr text-muted u-s026">Base</th>')
            print(f'<th class="tr text-muted u-s026">× {mult_label}</th>')
            print('</tr></thead><tbody>')
            for se in scored_entries:
                pos_str = "DQ" if se["position"] == "dq" else f'{se["position"]}º'
                pts_color = '#27ae60' if se["weighted_pts"] > 0 else '#888'
                print(f'<tr class="sep-bottom">')
                print(f'<td class="text-light u-s026">{se["name"]}</td>')
                print(f'<td class="tc u-s104">{pos_str}</td>')
                print(f'<td class="tr u-s104">{se["base_pts"]}</td>')
                print(f'<td class="tr" style="padding: 0.3rem; color: {pts_color}; font-weight: bold;">{se["weighted_pts"]}</td>')
                print('</tr>')
            print('</tbody></table>')
            print('</div></details>')

        print()

    print(':::')
else:
    print('*Nenhuma prova registrada ainda.*\n')
```

# Sistema de Pontuação {#pontuacao}

<div class="info-panel u-s018">

**Como funciona o ranking de provas**

Cada prova atribui pontos com base na **posição final** do participante. Os pontos-base são multiplicados pelo **tipo da prova**, valorizando provas de maior importância estratégica.

- **Posições sem dados** (não apareceram nas fontes) recebem `null` — não contam no cálculo.
- **Excluídos** (líder da semana, sorteio) não são penalizados — a prova não entra no denominador.
- **DQ** (desclassificação durante a prova) = 0 pontos, mas conta como participação.
- Participantes eliminados/desistentes são incluídos no ranking com as provas disputadas.

</div>

```{python}
#| label: scoring-tables
#| output: asis

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Scoring Reference Tables
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

placement_pts = scoring["placement_points"]
default_pts = scoring["placement_default"]
multipliers = scoring["type_multipliers"]

print('''
<div class="info-grid">

<div class="u-s124">
<h4 class="u-s215">🏅 Pontos por Posição</h4>
<table class="table-full fs-base">
''')

for pos, pts in sorted(placement_pts.items(), key=lambda x: int(x[0])):
    medal = '🥇' if pos == '1' else ('🥈' if pos == '2' else ('🥉' if pos == '3' else ''))
    print(f'<tr><td class="text-light u-s019">{medal} {pos}º lugar</td><td class="tr u-s214">{pts}</td></tr>')

print(f'<tr><td class="text-muted u-s019">9º+ lugar</td><td class="tr text-muted u-s386">{default_pts}</td></tr>')
print(f'<tr><td class="u-s226">DQ (desclassificado)</td><td class="tr u-s023">0</td></tr>')

print('''
</table>
</div>

<div class="u-s122">
<h4 class="u-s230">⚖️ Multiplicadores por Tipo</h4>
<table class="table-full fs-base">
''')

for tipo, mult in sorted(multipliers.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
    emoji = TIPO_EMOJI.get(tipo, "🏅")
    label = TIPO_LABEL.get(tipo, tipo.title())
    color = TIPO_COLOR.get(tipo, "#888")
    print(f'<tr><td class="text-light u-s019">{emoji} {label}</td><td class="tr" style="color: {color}; font-weight: bold; padding: 0.3rem 0;">{mult:.2f}×</td></tr>')

print('''
</table>
<p class="text-muted fs-md u-s412">Fórmula: <code>pontos_base × multiplicador</code></p>
</div>

</div>
''')
```

::: {.callout-note title="Fontes de Dados"}
- **Provas**: registradas manualmente em `data/provas.json` a partir de fontes GShow e transmissão ao vivo
- **Rankings**: calculados automaticamente por `scripts/build_derived_data.py` → `data/derived/prova_rankings.json`
:::
